summary: Cyrillic sub-project creation feature fully tested. All 13 features verified: Backend APIs (create-sub-project first/subsequent calls, Cyrillic letter codes PARENT-А/Б/В, data migration, aggregate endpoint, child inheritance) and Frontend UI (letter badges, Обобщено/Поотделно toggle, summary/individual views, +Под-обект dialog with first-split explanation, child detail page with parent badge).

issues: Console warnings about HTML nesting: '<th> cannot be child of <span>', '<td> cannot be child of <span>'. This is a React hydration warning but doesn't affect functionality.

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: HTML table structure in SubProjectsSummaryView and AggRowMulti components causes React hydration warnings. The dynamic rendering wraps <th> and <td> elements in <span> tags which is invalid HTML. Consider using React.Fragment or restructuring the table rendering.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 test sub-project during testing (TEST_Нов под-обект за тест) which was cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cyrillic sub-project feature fully tested. Key findings: 1) POST /api/projects/{id}/create-sub-project - first call creates А (with data migration) and Б (empty), subsequent calls create В, Г, Д... 2) Child codes follow pattern PARENT-А, PARENT-Б, PARENT-В using CYRILLIC_LETTERS='АБВГДЕЖЗИКЛМНОПРСТУФХЦЧШЩЪЬЮЯ'. 3) GET /api/projects/{id}/aggregate returns per-child breakdowns with team, invoices, offers, reports data. 4) Test project da29f0e4-532c-48b7-b12a-e5109bba51fc has 4 children (А, Б, В, Г after test). 5) Original project c3529276-8c03-49b3-92de-51216aab25da has NO sub-projects - can be used for first-split testing. 6) Frontend shows: letter badges (А, Б, В), Обобщено/Поотделно toggle, summary view with per-child stats cards and aggregate table, individual view with clickable list and chevrons, +Под-обект dialog with first-split migration explanation, child detail page shows 'Под-обект на PARENT' badge.

POST /api/projects/{id}/create-sub-proje: First call creates child А (with data migration) and child Б (empty)
Subsequent calls create В, Г, Д... with next Cyrillic letter
Each child has id, code, name, letter fields
Validates nested sub-projects not allowed (400 error)
GET /api/projects/{id}/aggregate: Returns has_children=true for parent with children
Returns has_children=false for project without children
Contains children array with per-child breakdowns
Each child has team, invoices, offers, reports data
Contains total aggregations across all children
child_code_pattern: Codes follow PARENT-А, PARENT-Б, PARENT-В pattern
child_inheritance: Child inherits client/owner data from parent (effective_project logic)

sub_projects_section: Shows letter badges (А, Б, В) with violet background
toggle_views: Toggle switches between summary and individual views
summary_view: Per-child stats cards with team count, invoices, paid amounts
data-testid='parent-aggregate' table with columns for each child + Общо
Rows: Хора, Часове днес, Фактури, Фактурирано, Платено, Неплатено, Оферти, Отчети, Общо часове
individual_view: Each item shows letter badge, name, code, status
add_sub_project_dialog: Dialog title: 'Разделяне на PROJECT_NAME' for first split
First-split explanation: 'При първо разделяне:' with 3 steps
Mentions PRJ-001-А (data migration) and PRJ-001-Б (new empty)
child_detail_page: Back button navigates to parent project
